title: The Big Cheese Cat and Dog Scatter Granules - 450 g, Natural/Biodegradable Humane Treatment and Deterrent, Protection for Gardens and Covers 150 m2, Ready-to-Use, Grey
features: EFFECTIVE: Protection of vulnerable patio and garden areas, including freshly tilled soil and loose gravel, against the digging and soiling of cats and dogs
ALL-NATURAL: Aromatic plant oils incorporated with a biodegradable clay substrate to create an aversive training aid that will successfully deter cats and dogs
CHILD AND PET SAFE: Pets, wildlife, and children need not be excluded from treatment areas and this harmless product will not stain or leave residual markings on hard surfaces
EASY-TO-USE: Scatter granules for easy application within the affected areas every 48 hours, or until cat or dog fouling and digging has ceased
RE-FILLABLE: Shaker pack with flip-top granule applicator treats up to 150 m2 and can be refilled using biodegradable refill pack (STV631)
description: From the manufacturer Jet-Spray Pond & Gardener Protector Pepper Dust - 300g Wind-Action Owl (prepped) Cat Repellent Granules - 450g (Prepped) Hawk Kite Bird Scarer The Big Mega-Sonic Solar Cat Repeller Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 2,166 3.6 out of 5 stars 2,490 3.5 out of 5 stars 3,774 3.5 out of 5 stars 5,633 3.4 out of 5 stars 964 3.5 out of 5 stars 718 Price £23.40 £ 23 . 40 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £5.24 £ 5 . 24 £28.69 £ 28 . 69 £14.52 £ 14 . 52 Description Keep your outdoor spaces safe without the use of harmful chemicals or unsightly barriers. Equipped with a PIR sensor, this motion sensor sprinkler instantly detects movement and unleashes a powerful spray of water This Pepper Dust provides a natural, non-harmful solution to deter cats, dogs, and wildlife from digging, scratching, and fouling in your garden, creating an effective barrier to protect vulnerable areas. This realistic owl decoy is designed to mimic the natural movements of a predator owl. Featuring life-like details, reflective eyes, and a wind-activated rotating head, it keeps your garden free from disturbances. Made with natural aromatic plant oils and a clay substrate, these granules provide a safe and effective deterrent for long-term protection of patios, gardens, walkways, and areas with freshly tilled soil or loose gravel. This Swoop Hawk Kite Bird Scarer deters birds humanely with its wind-activated, predator-like flight. Durable, weatherproof, and easy to set up, perfect for protecting outdoor spaces. The Mega-Sonic Solar Cat Repeller uses motion-activated ultrasonic bursts to deter cats humanely. Covers 60m², protecting your garden from fouling and damage. It is safe, effective, and easy to use. Targets Wildlife Wildlife Wildlife Wildlife Wildlife Wildlife Format Water Spray Powder Decoy Granules Decoy Ultrasonic Repellent
